title: Verify user successfully sets a reminder instead of canceling the trial
description: Tests the 'Loss Aversion' flow where a user initiates cancellation but chooses to set a reminder instead, keeping the trial active.
preconditions: User has an active trial (e.g., 6 days remaining).
User is part of the 'Trial Corner' experiment cohort.
User is on the 'Trial Corner' hub page.

steps.description: 1. Locate and click the 'Cancel Trial' button in the 'Manage Trial' section.
2. Observe the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up with the headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.'
3. Click the primary action button: 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.
4. Verify the pop-up closes and the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle is now enabled on the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: The trial remains active, the reminder toggle is set to 'ON', and the user is not shown the incentive offer. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with page source 'cancel pop-up'.
